CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Continued To Jun-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Continued To May-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT JOSEPH NAGLE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Continued to May 23, 2025, for both parties' noncompliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Both parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies reflecting the new hearing date forthwith. Failure to comply with this written order may result in sanctions or contempt proceedings. The court notes that any party can obviate the need for a continuance of a motion for lack of courtesy copies by simply lodging a complete set of courtesy copies of all documents related to the motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Continued To May-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT JOSEPH NAGLE MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Continued to May 23, 2025, for both parties' noncompliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Both parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies reflecting the new hearing date forthwith. Failure to comply with this written order may result in sanctions or contempt proceedings. The court notes that any party can obviate the need for a continuance of a motion for lack of courtesy copies by simply lodging a complete set of courtesy copies of all documents related to the motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
